انسان کو حیوان بنانے کا طریقہ

Free thinking can bring 'bout the ruin of those whose thoughts are low and mean: They don't possess the mode and style of though (that may be chaste and clean.

4/18/25, 11:58 AM - Mam Kamal Amal Teacher: Dear Fellows,

Step-by-step plan:

Room 8 → 7 → 6 → 5

Room 9 → 10 → 11 → 12

And last row:

Room 16 → 15 → 14 → 13

This path lets you:

Visit every room once.

Exit without re-entering any sealed room.

5/7/25, 5:29 AM - Abdullah Rana Amal Fellow, Software Engineering, Virtual University Of Pakistan: - Use strong and unique passwords.  
- Enable two-factor or multi-factor authentication.  
- Don’t click on suspicious links or attachments.  
- Avoid using public Wi-Fi without a VPN.  
- Secure your Wi-Fi with a strong password.  
- Backup important data regularly.  
- Lock your devices when not in use.  
- Don’t share sensitive information
- Be cautious of unknown phone calls, texts, or emails.  
- Encrypt sensitive data and files.  
- Use a firewall on all networks.
5/7/25, 5:32 AM - Abdullah Rana Amal Fellow, Software Engineering, Virtual University Of Pakistan: These are common practices, try be aware and cautious
Also uninstall any unverified applications, games, e.t.c, don't visit random sites. Becareful guys it is a War.

5/17/25, 9:09 PM - +92 344 3408374: Yes, if someone has failed by 1 or 2 marks, they can immediately write an application to the university's examination department requesting a grace mark. Some universities grant students grace marks and pass them. Alternatively, if the failed subjects are not cleared by the completion of all semesters, the university may pass the students and award them grace marks on its own.

5/19/25, 6:31 PM - Faira Hasnat Amal Fellow: Ready to Make a Difference? Apply Now for the Akhuwat Fellowship Program (AFP)! 

Applications are now open for the highly anticipated Akhuwat Fellowship Program!
AFP is on a mission to nurture the next generation of empathetic and visionary leaders—young individuals dedicated to building a more inclusive and equitable society. We are looking for passionate changemakers who believe in the power of kindness and innovation to uplift marginalized communities.

Through a combination of virtual and in-person training sessions, interactive activities, thought-provoking discussions, and field visits, AFP provides fellows with the tools, skills, and experiences needed to drive positive change. By the end of the fellowship, participants will be equipped to lead initiatives that make a real impact in their communities.

Tentative Program Dates:

Cohort 1: 16th June - 5th July (Online)

Cohort 2: 7th July to 1st August (In-person, Lahore)

Eligibility:
Applicants must be between 17 and 25 years old. We encourage individuals from all academic and professional backgrounds to apply.

Deadline to Apply: 5th June, 2025

Apply Here: https://forms.gle/cgF5mC7yb3V6AKwJ6

Become a part of a transformative journey. Join AFP and take the first step toward becoming the leader your community needs!

5/20/25, 2:51 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: Hum Amal ke Fellow hain, kismat wale lgty 
Shuru mein sirf PW ka bojh hi kafi lagta  😩,
Phir aaye group, phir leader banaye gaye,
Tab ja ke hum poore jhanjhat mein daal diye gaye 🌀.


Har hafte nayi museebat, koi naya kaam hota hai,
Group active na ho to leader ka dil hi dooba hota hai 🫠,
Kaun aya, kaun gaya, sab kuch humein note karna parta 📝,
Yeh Amal Fellowship hai bhai, koi chutti ka package nahi milta! 🧳❌


Ab fundraising ka aya daur, hum ne kaha "Chanda Mangna",
Log bole: "Pehle kyun na bataya, kab se yeh dhanda chal raha?" 🤑
Hum bole: "Dil se do, maqsad bara hai",
Woh bole: "Yeh dialogue to kai dafa sun chuke hain, kuch naya sunao zara!" 🎭


Udhar thesis, udhar test,
Hum bolein: "Aa jao dost!"
Woh bole: "Hum to pehle hi stressed!" 😵‍💫
Kuch to aise hain jo group ka naam bhi bhool gaye,
Na kabhi online aaye, na kisi ka haal poocha gaye! 📴


Chay hafte mile brand launch karne ko,
Hum ne kaha: "Fifty ki sale ho ya hundred ho!"
Par ab tak idea hi final na ho paya,
Confusion itna ke dimaagh bhi ghoom gaya aaya! 🔄


Weekend aaye to session ka bacha na koi bahaana,
1:30 se 4:30 tak camera on ka hai fasaana 🎥,
Dus minute ka break milta hai jaise Eid ho Eddie pe,
Baaki waqt sirf "active raho!" ki awaaz hoti hai feed pe,
Kabhi cheekh kar "YES!" kehna, kabhi nod karna zaroori,
Amal ke sessions mein hoti hai acting bhi poori poori! 🎭


Phir bhi hum muskuraate hain, thak kar bhi aage badhte hain,
Kabhi PW, kabhi Zoom – har mod par nikal padte hain 💪,
Kyunke hum hain Amal Fellow, hamari pehchaan hi alag hai,
Tension ho ya task – hamari team kabhi haar nahi maanti hai! 🌟

Prepare for a new career in the high-growth field of project management. No experience or degree is required.

Professional Certificate: 6 Course Series:

1. Foundations of Project Management

→ Beginner level
→ 4 Modules
→ 18 hours (approximately)

→ Beginner level
→ 4 Modules
→ 21 hours (approximately)

URL: *https://lnkd.in/d5US-gda*

This course will explore how to map out a project in the second phase of the project life cycle: the project planning phase.

→ Beginner level
→ 5 Modules
→ 29 hours (approximately)

URL: https://lnkd.in/dXgdPWyr

This course will delve into the execution and closing phases of the project life cycle.

URL: https://lnkd.in/deCSBbCS

6/14/25, 6:51 AM - Tasbeeha Fatima: ❓The Quiz Question:
“What do the following algorithms have in common?”

Naïve Bayes

Logistic Regression

Support Vector Machine

Classification Tree

Random Forest

Gradient Boosted Tree

✅ My Answer (Marked Incorrect):
They are all supervised machine learning algorithms used for classification tasks in marketing analytics.

This is factually accurate based on everything in the video lectures and machine learning literature. But Coursera marks it wrong.

📚 Here’s what I’ve tried to prove (still marked wrong):
They all use the structure of data to learn decision boundaries — they don’t rely on human rules.

All use some form of optimization, whether:

Statistical (Naïve Bayes)

Geometric (SVM)

Greedy (Decision Trees)

Iterative (Boosting)

Most support both classification & regression tasks, making them flexible for different marketing problems.

Most are discriminative classifiers, focused on predicting outcomes, not modeling data distributions.

They are commonly used in real-world marketing: customer segmentation, churn prediction, targeting, fraud detection, etc.

They all handle binary or multi-class classification, unlike models like ARIMA or linear regression.

Despite these valid and supported points — backed by Coursera’s own video transcript — I keep getting marked wrong.

📽️ I even reviewed the course videos (Sections 1.2 and 1.3) and found that:
The instructor groups and explains these algorithms in a progressive sequence:

Probabilistic (Naïve Bayes)

Linear (Logistic Regression)

Margin-based (SVM)

Rule-based (Classification Tree)

Ensemble (Random Forest, Gradient Boosted Tree)

The course explicitly states that:

"Most of these methods can be used for both classification and regression."


I can even provide the video script excerpts that support my case if needed.

6/16/25, 7:35 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: تم جب آؤ گے، تو خالی پاؤ گے ہمیں
یہ دل، یہ کمرہ، سب کتابوں میں چھپے ہوں گے کہیں

ہم نے جو خواب سنوارے، وہ تمہارے لیے تھے
اور جواب میں فقط خاموش اندھیرے لیے تھے

پوچھے گا کوئی، تو مسکرا کر کہہ دیں گے
کسی کو سنبھالنے میں، ہم خود بکھر گئے کہیں

خاموش رہنے کی عادت تھی، سزا بن گئی
یہ زہر اندر ہی اندر، زندگی چاٹ گئی

اور اب تو بس یہی خواہش رہ گئی ہے باقی
دیمک لگا ہے دل پہ… اُسے بھی ختم کرنے دو، یہی کافی

محبت؟ شاید… بے نام سا اک درد تھا
جسے نبھایا، مگر کبھی سمجھ نہ پایا کوئی بھی

6/21/25, 9:25 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: nhi mn serious nhi hoe bs mood off tha to apko shyd voice serious lgi                                                                                                                                                        🌙 "بس ایک لمحے کی ہنسی" 🌙
کبھی کبھی یوں ہی بول پڑتی ہوں،
کسی کی خاطر ڈول پڑتی ہوں۔
نہ طنز ہوتا، نہ زخم کوئی،
بس ایک لمحے میں کھِل پڑتی ہوں۔

یہ وقت ایسا ہے، سب تھکے ہوئے،
چہرے بجھے، خواب سہمے ہوئے۔
ہنسی کی قیمت بہت بڑھ گئی،
دلوں کے موسم ہیں جمے ہوئے۔

میں خود بھی کب سے ہنستی نہیں،
بس باتوں میں تھوڑی روشنی۔
کہ شاید کوئی، جو چپ سا ہو،
اُسی لمحے میں پا لے زندگی۔

اگر کبھی کوئی بات چُب گئی،
تو میری نیت کہاں تھی سخت کئی؟
نہ بوجھ دوں، نہ درد بنوں،
بس چاہوں کہ اک پل ہنس سکے وہ نئی۔

نہ نام لوں، نہ ذاتی کہوں،
نہ لفظ کو تیز دھار بنوں۔
میں بات کروں تو درد بہ جائے،
ہنسی کی کوئی بہار بنوں۔

6/28/25, 5:19 PM - Mam Kamal Amal Teacher: Thanx thnx note:

Dear IDP and my 6-band score,

Thank you for gifting me the chance to release infinite drops of tears today. I truly cherished the process as they rolled down my cheeks, carrying 99.9% emotions of (failures and disappointments), and  just a trace of water. I tried to hold them back, but they were far too eager to escape from my beautiful eyes. Now, my eyes feel so light, yet my heart........well, no, my heart feels light too.

Oh, dear IELTS and your 6 bands, what a unique mix of emotions you have given me this morning. Demotivated yet still hopeful. Afraid but still ready to face challenges head-on and achieve my goals. Big dreams are not meant to break; they are meant to come true.

I promise not to cry when I call my mom and siblings to share the news of your generous 6-band score....well, maybe just a little laugh instead of tears. But truly, thank you for reminding me that hope persists, no matter the circumstances.

Life is an endless canvas of opportunities, and I know the best, most unexpected ones are still waiting for me. With your gentle push, I'll rise, stronger and more determined. And someday, this will just be a part of the story I tell.

Best,
Kamal

🔖Deadline: 30 September 2025

🎁 What the Scholarship Covers
✅ Full tuition fee coverage
💶 Monthly stipend of €1250
🏥 Health insurance & visa support (depending on university)
🌍 Opportunity to study in English or Portuguese

🏛️ Access to Portugal’s top universities

🌐 Enhance your future career in European job markets

🏖️ Cultural immersion in Portugal’s rich lifestyle and heritage

✅ Eligibility Criteria
You are eligible if you:

Are a citizen of any country outside Portugal

Meet the academic qualifications for your chosen program:

📘 Bachelor’s: Must have completed high school

🎓 Master’s: Must hold a bachelor’s degree
📚 Ph.D.: Must hold a master’s degree

👉Provide proof of English or Portuguese proficiency
👉Have a strong academic record and motivation

📄 Required Documents
To apply, prepare the following:
📝 Completed application form

📚 Academic transcripts and degree certificates
🌐 Language proficiency test scores (e.g., TOEFL/IELTS)
✍️ Personal statement or motivation letter

📑 Updated CV
📮 Two letters of recommendation
🛂 Copy of valid passport
🖼️ Recent passport-sized photo
📎 Additional documents (if required by the university)
🏛️ Participating Universities
Available at public and private universities across Portugal offering accredited programs in:

Engineering

Business & Economics

Science & Technology

Social Sciences

Humanities

Environmental Studies
…and more!

📝 How to Apply
Research universities and programs in Portugal

👉Collect all necessary documents

👉Access the official portal or apply via your selected university’s website

👉Write a powerful motivation letter

👉Submit your application before 30 September 2025

7/8/25, 6:38 PM - Engr. Aftab Saqib Amal Academy: *Job Opportunity* !! 

Any fresh grad or recent to be grad background with science passionate to do a job in *Nestle* in *Nutrition* department as a Medical delegate associate please share your CV/resume with me. 


 *Requirements* :
Female only
Isb based only

Only contact if job suits to you, its a field kin of job.
7/8/25, 6:38 PM - Engr. Aftab Saqib Amal Academy: Medical Delegate Associate in Nestlé is responsible for promoting Nestlé products, particularly in infant nutrition, by communicating accurate information to healthcare professionals. This role involves detailing products, building relationships with healthcare providers, and ensuring compliance with company guidelines and relevant regulations. The primary goal is to achieve active recommendation and advocacy of Nestlé products when breastfeeding is not possible or chosen. 
Key Responsibilities:
Product Detailing:
Ethically and scientifically communicating the features and benefits of Nestlé products to healthcare professionals (HCPs), including pediatricians, midwives, and general practitioners. 
Relationship Building:
Establishing and maintaining strong relationships with HCPs to foster trust and encourage product recommendations. 
Compliance:
Ensuring all activities are in line with Nestlé's policies, the WHO International Code of Marketing of Breast-Milk Substitutes, and local regulations. 
Territory Management:
Planning and executing promotional activities within an assigned territory, including organizing medical activities in hospitals and pharmacies. 
Market Analysis:
Analyzing sales data and market trends to inform interactions with HCPs and adapt strategies. 
Reporting:
Following up on client visits, reporting on activities, and identifying potential market developments. 
Skills and Qualifications:
Strong Communication and Negotiation Skills: Effective communication with HCPs is crucial for conveying product information and building relationships. 
Analytical Skills: The ability to analyze data and market trends is important for making informed decisions and adapting strategies. 
Organization and Planning: Managing multiple tasks, planning routes, and organizing activities are essential for success. 
Independence and Self-Motivation: The role often requires independent work and the ability to manage tasks effectively. 
Adaptability and Results-Driven: The ability to adapt to changing situations and focus on achieving objectives is important. 
Valid Driver's License: This is often a requirement for field-based roles. 
Knowledge of the Business Environment: Understanding the healthcare landscape and industry trends is beneficial.

7/13/25, 7:13 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: 🌟 Amal Farewell Poem 🌟
Ek yaadgaar safar, ehsasat ki zubaani

Kabhi team work, kabhi apni baat
Har lamha tha seekhnay ki rat
Ustaadon ne shikaya, raasta dikhaya
Har mod pe humein hosla dilaya

*For @⁨Shah Zain Amal Fellow⁩  hardwork and consistency*

Shehzeen ki baaton mein jazba kamaal
Har kaam mein woh banay aik misaal

*For @⁨Abdullah Rana Amal Fellow, Software Engineering, Virtual University Of Pakistan⁩ available all time*

Abdullah har dam online rahe
Har uljhan mein woh rahein bane


*For @⁨Muhammad Hussain Amal Fellow⁩  attention to detail*

Husnain ki soch mein gehraai hai
"Analyst" ki alag hi pahchan hai

*For Imran poetry and silent nature*

Imran ki chup mein bhi baat hai
Shairi mein chhupi infiraadiyat ki zaat hai


*For @⁨Rubab Ahmad Amal Fellow Saudia, BS Business Administrations Virtual University⁩ accent*

Rubab ka lehja, English mein kamaal
Accent aisa, jaise ho shafaaf khayaal

For miss @⁨Mam Kamal Amal Teacher⁩ 

Ilm o waqar ki woh chalti misaal
Har lafz mein chhupa ho jaise kamaal
Zara si der ho to aa jaaye kadak
Par shagird ka dard ho to ban jaayein narm palk

For @⁨Engr. Aftab Saqib Amal Academy⁩ 

Aftab Sir ka andaaz nirala
Ilm ke saath ho mazaah ka hawala

*For @⁨Saba Gull Amal Fellow BS Physics Swat University⁩ pathan accent*

Saba Gul ki baaton mein Sindhi rang
Alfaaz mein chhupi riwayaat ki jang


*For Danial singing*

Daniyal hai jo mehfil ka sangeet
Us ki awaaz mein chhupi hain jeet ke meethay reet


*For @⁨Faira Hasnat Amal Fellow⁩ magical Voice*

Feira ki awaaz, jadoo sa raag
Sun kar lage, jaise khul jaaye koi band baagh

*For @⁨Abdul Ahad Amal Fellow⁩ talking in session*
Abdul Muqsit ki baaton mein ik taazgi thi
Live chat mein josh, har pal aik zindagi thi
Baaton se sab ko saath nibhaaya
Na sonay diya, na session ko bore honay diya
Hansi mein, mazaaq mein — har dil jeet liya


*For @⁨Suleman Masih Amal Fellow OTT GCU Faisalabad⁩ way of talking that makes every point clear even to a basic understanding level person*


Sulaiman Mahesh ki baatein thin narm o saaf
Mushkil ko samjhaaya jaise ke ho harf-e-shafaaf


*For @⁨Noman Hussain Amal Fellow⁩  and @⁨Zulqarnain Hyder Amal Fellow BS Development Communication, University Of Sindh, From Hyderabad⁩ Sindhi talks that confuse me*


Noman aur Zulkarnain ki Sindhi baatein
Kabhi lagein paheliyaan, kabhi uljhi raatein
Par un ki baaton mein tha aik pyaar
Dil se juday, rahe hamesha humaaray yaar

*💫 Aur sabhi doston ke liye 💫*

Jo bolay kam, par dil se juray
Jo hans ke har lamha humein sahaara day
Yeh rishta rahay, tootay na kabhi
Yaadein hoon roshan, chhootay na kabhi

Aakhri din hai, par pyaar nahin kam
Amal ki yeh mehfil, rahay dilon mein humdum
Chand lamhay thay, par yaadein bay-shumaar day gaya
Amal humein seekhnay ka ek naya waqar day gaya

Mehnat, yaqeen, aur khud par bharosa
Har din humein sikhaya kuch khaas niraala sa

Yeh lamhay, yeh saathi, yeh muskaraahaton ke pal
Amal ki yaadein rahengi dil ke har gul
Rahain yeh rishte, kabhi kam na hon
Yeh dosti ki khushboo, hamesha hum mein ho

Har shakhs yahan tha aik khaas kitaab
Kisi mein hansi, kisi mein jawab
Kisi ki aankh mein sapne thay chhupe
Kisi ke lafzon mein maani thay juray

Har ek ka hai apna alag sa maqam
Kabhi roshni, kabhi lutf o paighaam
Koi tha samajhdaar, koi dilnashin
Koi har khabar mein tha shaamil kahin

Yeh dosti, yeh pal, rahenge sada
Amal ki yeh duniya, khwabon ki sada
Jahan bhi raho tum, duaaon mein ho
Jo seekha yahan, woh raahon mein ho

Yeh mehfil, yeh moments, yeh screen ki smiles
Rahengi dil mein jaise mehfooz old files

Milain phir kabhi, to pehchaan lena
Hum wohi log hain — jo seekhnay mein thay magan, jeena

Jo likha, woh dil se, jazbaton se buna
Har lafz mein tha, sachcha sa fasana
Amal ki yaadon ka yeh niraala khazana
Tasbeeha ke qalam se likha gaya afsana 💫 <This message was edited>

7/18/25, 5:53 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: Internship In Lahore

A Paid, 3-Month Internship Opportunity for Fresh Graduates in Engineering, HR, and IT

We’re excited to announce the Tameer-e-Mustaqbil Internship Program – a project-based, paid internship designed to equip fresh graduates with real-world industry experience!

📍 Location: Gulberg, Lahore
🕘 Timings: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
📅 Duration: 3 Months

👩‍🎓 Who Can Apply?
Recent graduates (with a minimum CGPA of 3.0) from the following disciplines:

🔹 Human Resources
🔹 Electrical Engineering
🔹 Mechatronics Engineering
🔹 IT / Computer Network Engineering

💼 Why Join?
✅ Project-Based, Hands-On Experience
✅ Mentorship by Industry Experts
✅ Competitive Stipend
✅ Supportive, Growth-Focused Work Environment
✅ Professional Networking & Skill Development

🎯 Eligibility Criteria
✔ Fresh graduates with CGPA 3.0 or above
✔ Strong communication & teamwork skills
✔ Eagerness to learn, contribute, and grow

📧 Ready to Apply?
Send your updated resume to fahad.zafar@dwp.com.pk

7/21/25, 3:33 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: Recently, a tragic incident occurred in Balochistan, where a woman was murdered simply because she chose to marry a man of her own choice. When Islam itself gives her this right, who are we to take it away? Just because of a family's fake sense of ego, they killed her in front of everyone — in public view.

If we look at many Baloch families, they are extremely conservative and highly conscious about their so-called "honor." They claim that a woman choosing her partner brings shame to the family, especially if it becomes known among other men. But I ask: when they murdered her in front of all those men, where was their so-called honor then? Isn’t that the real shame? Their ego mattered more than her life.

On the other hand, when we look at women from other countries who come to Pakistan and marry men here, their families often accept it without clinging to fake ego or false pride. This proves that the problem is not about man vs. woman — the real issue lies in the mindset.

It starts at home. The problem is that many mothers fail to teach their sons the right values — values of respect, equality, and humanity. As those sons grow up and become the head of the household — whether as brothers, fathers, or husbands — they impose the same toxic mindset on their families. And this cycle continues.

But if by chance, one person in the family does not adopt this backward mentality, if someone chooses a different, more progressive path, they are labeled as baghi — a rebel — or called "mannerless." Sometimes, they are even killed for simply refusing to follow the same oppressive mindset.
7/21/25, 3:34 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: We were born in Pakistan, but to be honest, we’ve grown to hate what this country has become — not the homeland itself, but the politicians who have dragged it down so badly. Because of their failures, Pakistan is now a place where many global websites and platforms are banned. And even when the government stops interfering, the damage doesn't end there.

Whatever is left is ruined by the outdated, narrow-minded traditions imposed by society — traditions upheld by people who are more concerned with control than progress. These societal pressures, born from ignorance and ego, continue to suffocate freedom, individuality, and basic human rights.

کیا باپ کی زمہ داری نہیں کہ وہ اولاد کی تربیت کرے۔۔۔؟ دراصل یہاں ہوتا ایسا ہے کہ ماں تو اپنے بچے کی تربیت خود ہی اچھے سے کرتی ہے۔ چونکہ اس بیچاری کو پہلے ہی ڈرا دھمکا کے رکھا جاتا کہ تیری اولاد نے یہ کر دیا وہ کر دیا۔ تو بچے بڑے ہو کر اپنے ہی بڑوں کو دیکھ کر سب کچھ سیکھ لیتے ہیں۔ پھر وہ اپنے کلیگز اور دوستوں کو بھی ویسے ہی ٹریٹ کرتے جیسے ان کے بڑے دوسروں کو ٹریٹ کرتے۔ اب حالات نسل در نسل خراب سے بد تر ہو چکے ہیں۔ اگر معاشرے کو بگاڑا نسل در نسل ہے تو سنوارنے کیلئے بھی نسل در نسل کام کرنا پڑے گا۔ تو بہتر ہے پہلی شروعات اپنے ہی گھر سے کی جائے۔

8/3/25, 10:50 AM - Armish Khan Amal Fellow(RYK): The said scholarship is open to female applicants only.
8/3/25, 10:50 AM - Armish Khan Amal Fellow(RYK): The Pakistan Scottish Scholarship Scheme Scotland Pakistan Scholarship for Young Women and Girls is available for candidates pursuing either:

Undergraduate level for a four-year’s bachelor’s degree in any HEC recognized university across Pakistan
Master’s levels degree with a maximum two-year master’s/MPhil degree in any HEC recognized university across Pakistan.
8/3/25, 10:50 AM - Armish Khan Amal Fellow(RYK): Deadline to apply;
31-Aug-2025
8/3/25, 10:50 AM - Armish Khan Amal Fellow(RYK): Following subject areas only:

Education
Sustainable Energy
Food Security and Agriculture
Health Sciences
STEM (only for Masters degree)
Climate
8/3/25, 10:50 AM - Armish Khan Amal Fellow(RYK): In addition, applicants must:

Be Pakistani nationals currently residing in Pakistan  
Be pursuing a two year master’s degree or four years bachelors degree in the above listed subject areas
Hold a confirmed admission offer from an HEC recognised university in Pakistan.

Company: *Fongrow - Fauji Foundation*
Location: *DHA Phase 8, Lahore*

*1. Coordinate Across Departments:* Facilitate communication and collaboration between various departments to ensure seamless execution of projects and tasks. Act as a point of contact to streamline processes and resolve any interdepartmental issues.

*2. Maintain and Update Commitment Charts:* Develop and manage commitment charts, ensuring all commitments, deadlines, and responsibilities are tracked and met. Regularly update charts to reflect progress and adjust timelines as needed.

*3. Prepare and Present Management Reports:* Create detailed presentations and reports for senior management, synthesizing data and insights to support decision-making. Ensure all presentations are clear, concise, and aligned with the management's strategic goals.

*4. Monitor and Follow-Up on Action Items:* Track the completion of action items assigned during meetings, ensuring that timelines are adhered to. Provide regular updates to management on the status of tasks and deliverables.

10/5/25, 8:09 PM - Tasbeeha Fatima: رہنماؤں کا قافلہ، روشنی کا پیام ہے
جو جگائے خوابِ دل، وہی تو اَمل کا نام ہے

آپ نے سکھایا ہمیں، خود پہ کیسے یقین ہو
ایک چراغ بن کے ہم، اوروں کی بھی زین ہو

ہر قدم پہ رہبری، فہم و دانش کی عطا
حوصلے کی داستاں، آپ ہی سے ابتدا

سبق دیا کہ کام ہی، دراصل عبادت ہے
خدمتِ انسان میں ہی، سچی ریاضت ہے

ہم نے سیکھا اَمل سے، کردار کا جمال ہے
یہ سفر نہیں فقط، یہ تو ایک کمال ہے

دعا ہے رہنماؤں پر، رب کی خاص عنایت ہو
جہاں میں جہاں آپ ہوں، وہاں روشنی قائم ہو 🌟
